char.name: Yedem of Shechem
char.bio: Ferryman in Shechem. Wells and grazing rights, the eternal quarrels out here.

friends.name: Resh
friends.bio: Herdsman in the camp of Abram. We follow the man and his God across this land, tent to tent, well to well. He treats his servants well, and the flocks are fat this season. Praise be.

friends.name: Isaac
friends.bio: Child of the promise, laughter is in my very name. Walking the land my father was given and trusting the God who provides. 🐑

friends.name: Eliezer of Damascus
friends.bio: Steward of Abraham's house. If it must be trusted, trust it to me. Off to find a wife for the young master.

friends.name: Hagar
friends.bio: Maidservant from Egypt. Life took a hard turn, but God saw me by the spring in the wilderness. He is the God who sees. 🌅

friends.name: Ishmael
friends.bio: Son of Abraham. God promised to make me a great nation too. Living free in the open desert with a bow in hand. 🏹

friends.name: Hodael the Elder
friends.bio: An old servant in Abraham's house. I was there the night the LORD took him outside and said, 'Look now toward heaven, and count the stars, so shall your offspring be.' Mark my words: a great nation will rise from this old man and his promised son. I won't live to see it. You might.

friends.name: Abram
friends.bio: Called to leave my country and my father's house. God promised to make me a great nation.

friends.name: Sarai
friends.bio: Wife of Abram. Following my husband into the unknown. Barren, but keeping faith.

friends.name: Lot
friends.bio: Son of Haran, traveling with my uncle Abram. Looking for well-watered land for my flocks.

friends.name: Rebekah
friends.bio: Drew water for a stranger and all his camels, and it changed my whole life. Veiled and on the road to meet my husband. ✨

friends.name: Esau
friends.bio: Firstborn of Isaac. A man of the open field, give me the hunt and the red hills. That stew? Worth it at the time. 🏹

friends.name: Jacob
friends.bio: Younger twin with a strong grip, they call me the heel-grabber. Saw a ladder to heaven once. Still chasing the blessing. 🪜
